name: TestMostReadReg
title: TestMostReadReg
syntax: long TestMostReadReg(long aChannel, long aChip, dword aOffset, dword aRegDataLen, unsigned long aTimeout);
description: Reads one or several chip registers in the MOST hardware and waits for the result. If the operation is successful, the written register values can be read out using TestMostRegGetData.

parameters.name: aChip
parameters.description: MOST hardware chip ID. Possible values are: 1 : OS814 (other chips cannot be accessed as of yet)

parameters.name: aRegDataLen
parameters.description: Number of registers to be read. Values between 1 and 16 are possible.

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms] (Transmission of 0: no timeout monitoring; test module waits infinitely long)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
